title: Gardens of the Dead
description: Adds new spooky biomes to the Nether
body:
![Gardens of the Dead logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ochotonida/gardens-of-the-dead/HEAD/neoforge/src/main/resources/logo.png)

Gardens of the dead is a mod that adds new spooky biomes to the Nether, created for [Spooky Jam 2022](https://spooky-jam.com/). 
Along with the new biomes, Gardens of the Dead also adds new plants and decorative blocks.
Currently, 2 biomes are added, the Soulblight Forest and the Whistling Woods, pictured below. More biomes will (eventually) be added in the future, possibly with new mobs as well.

![img](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/37985539/196479401-d3e72f76-9ab4-4d3f-86a4-09163c98e60e.png)
